# v10.0.0

> This release adopts a new versioning scheme aligned with .NET: the first segment matches the .NET major version, the second is a major library update, and the third is a minor update or patch (e.g. `10.x.y`).

**Release date:** 2026-04-17
**Minimum .NET version:** .NET 8.0
**Supported .NET versions:** .NET 8.0, .NET 9.0, .NET 10.0

---

## Improvements

### `Mediator` — Process-wide static dispatcher cache

`RequestDispatchers` is now a **static, process-wide cache** shared across all `Mediator` instances. Previously, each `Mediator` instance maintained its own `ConcurrentDictionary`, meaning the reflection-based dispatcher creation occurred once per instance per request type.

With this change, dispatcher creation via reflection happens **at most once per request type for the entire lifetime of the application**, regardless of the DI lifetime configured for `Mediator` (transient, scoped, or singleton). This significantly reduces overhead in high-throughput scenarios with transient or scoped registrations.

### Build system — Centralized `Directory.Build.props`

A root-level `Directory.Build.props` now defines shared build properties for the entire solution:

- `TargetFrameworks`: `net8.0;net9.0;net10.0`
- `ImplicitUsings`: `enable`
- `Nullable`: `enable`

Each sub-folder (`src/`, `benchmarks/`, `samples/`, `tests/`) chains to the root via MSBuild's `GetPathOfFileAbove`, inheriting shared settings while being able to add folder-specific overrides. Individual project files no longer need to declare `TargetFramework`, `ImplicitUsings`, or `Nullable`.

A `tests/Directory.Packages.props` centralizes TFM-conditional package versions for test dependencies (e.g. `Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection` is resolved to `8.0.x`, `9.0.x`, or `10.0.x` based on the active target framework).

### Code cleanup

Removed redundant `using` directives in `MediatorExtensions.cs` for both the Command and Query modules.

---

## What's Changed

| # | Title | Type |
|---|-------|------|
| [#27](https://github.com/arcanic-kit/mediator/pull/27) | Make `RequestDispatchers` a process-wide static cache | Performance |
| [#28](https://github.com/arcanic-kit/mediator/pull/28) | Centralize .NET version and build config in `Directory.Build.props` | Infrastructure |
| [#23](https://github.com/arcanic-kit/mediator/pull/23) – [#26](https://github.com/arcanic-kit/mediator/pull/26) | README updates | Documentation |
| [#28](https://github.com/arcanic-kit/mediator/pull/28) | Trim README (remove Features, Migration from MediatR, Contributing sections) | Documentation |
